_note: Component registry. Components are implemented and validated. A module is a coherent bundle of components that ship together. The composer (bootstrap-harness skill) reads this to know what each module contributes when a profile selects it. Component file layout is defined in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.

core.description: Always installed. The bootstrap engine, harness lifecycle commands, the self-validators, and the constitution scaffold. Every profile includes this.

rules-common.description: Language-agnostic rule packs, scoped by `paths:` globs where applicable.

review.description: Code review with anti-noise discipline and an optional dual independent reviewer.

eval.description: Eval-Driven Development: capability vs regression graders, pass@k / pass^k, golden-set scaffold.

memory.description: Confidence + dated-evidence memory with a curation rule and an integrity validator.

hooks-quality.description: Quality-gate hooks: fact/citation edit gate, config protection, no-verify block, batched typecheck at Stop.

context-bundles.description: The tiered-context bundle system: WARM context indexes, the invisible-20% checklist, and bundle-lint with a negative fixture.

orchestration.description: Workflow patterns, the T0/T1/T2 autonomy ladder, and decentralized agent handoff routing.

integrations.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configs: the catalog of AVAILABLE MCP servers (mcp/<name>.json snippets) plus their structural validator. Enablement/merge-into-settings is a separate later change.

python.description: Python / FastAPI stack pack: ruff + mypy + pytest discipline, async patterns.

typescript.description: TypeScript / Next.js stack pack: tsc --noEmit discipline, eslint, vitest.

database.description: Postgres-focused: expand-contract zero-downtime migrations, migration safety, schema review.

security.description: Security review + guardrails: secret scanning, threat-aware review, sensitive-path protection, and the federated-catalog admission auditors (injection + repo safety, ADR-0017 §5a).

loops.description: Loop authorship: declarative checked-in loop definitions with structural maker/checker split, bounded exits, and tier gating. Forge authors loops; native runtimes (loop command, cron, CI, headless) execute them. See docs/LOOPS-MODULE-DESIGN.md.
